text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, Digital... There's something I've been
meaning to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hwaughhh! You have a question for me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm an open book! Please ask me anything you
want!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay, thank you! I was wondering...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You looked really excited when you said "This is
totally going in the next volume!" So tell me, what
is it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: GASP! I... I can't believe... You mean I... said that out loud?! Don't tell me I was speaking the whole time?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Are The Secret Race and The Feel of Your Tail popular manga right now? Or are they training books or something?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
HNNNGGG... You even know... the titles! N-no
more... I'm... dying of cringe!
